candidate_check.description: The Windows Remote Management (WinRM) client must not use Digest authentication.

check_content_excerpt:
If the following registry value does not exist or is not configured as specified, this is a finding:

Registry Hive: HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE
Registry Path: \SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\WinRM\Client\

Value Name: AllowDigest

Value Type: REG_DWORD
Value: 0
fix_text_excerpt: Configure the policy value for Computer Configuration >> Administrative Templates >> Windows Components >> Windows Remote Management (WinRM) >> WinRM Client >> "Disallow Digest authentication" to "Enabled".
title: The Windows Remote Management (WinRM) client must not use Digest authentication.
